name: Danish Onion - Champagne Soup
recipeIngredient: 5 tbsp Butter or margarine, or oil
Salt and fresh ground pepper to taste
Half a Camembert cheese (or small Brie)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onions in butter until they begin to turn golden.
2. Add the boiling water, salt, pepper, and a dash of Cayenne pepper and nutmeg.
3. Add bay leaves. Stir well and bring the mixture to a boil again.
4. Reduce heat to low-med. and cook, covered, for 20 minutes.
5. Add the entire bottle of champagne and bring the soup to a boil once more.
6. Then add the cheese and mix it well in the boiling soup.
7. Beat the egg yolks together with the Port wine and add the egg-wine mixture to the soup.
8. Stir well. Turn off heat and let the soup rest, covered, for 10 minutes.
- The soup must not boil again after the egg-wine mixture has been added.
9. Place a slice of fried bread in the center of each bowl and ladle the soup on top.
10. Serve hot.
